fields.description: The web-form field name (a plain identifier, e.g. patient_name). Becomes the submission column.
fields.label: Field

fields.description: The web-form input type (same set as the native Web Form builder).
fields.label: Fieldtype
fields.options:
Data
Phone
Select
Date
Datetime
Time
Check
Int
Float
Currency
Small Text
Text
Text Editor
Attach
Attach Image
Link
Password
Rating
Signature
Color
Duration
HTML
Section Break
Column Break
Page Break

fields.description: Label shown on the public form (defaults to a title-cased Field name).
fields.label: Custom Label

fields.description: For Select: one option per line. For Link: the target DocType.
fields.label: Options

fields.description: Where this field's value lands. lead = CRM Lead; plan/care/lab/drug = the matching child profile; note = an FCRM Note. Leave blank for layout-only fields (Section/Column Break, HTML).
fields.label: Target Table
fields.options:
lead
plan
care
lab
drug
note

fields.description: The fieldname on the resolved doctype the value lands in (for note: the Note title). One row must target lead → mobile_no (the lead's phone).
fields.label: Target Field

fields.description: Optional companion 'Other / enter manually' field, used when the pick is empty or 'Other'.
fields.label: Manual Field

fields.description: If a manual value is used, auto-create this master record (so it joins the pick-list next time).
fields.label: Master DocType

fields.description: Show this field only when another field meets the condition below (compiled to depends_on).
fields.label: Show If Field

fields.description: The value to compare against (used only by the 'equals' operator).
fields.label: Show If Value
